calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR# 8098.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Zeus Living, Inc.
Witnesses Srinivas Panguluri and Eric Montoya sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Eric Jackson.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 204 Valencia Street, Unit 1, San Francisco, San Francisco County, California 94103.
Damages $2,200.00
Holdover damages $10,350.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $505.00
For a Total Judgment of $13,055.00
Judgment signed in open court.
